sentences.text_original: 你周末一般做什么运动？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōumò yìbān zuò shénme yùndòng?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari odatda qanday sport bilan shug'ullanasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Каким спортом ты обычно занимаешься по выходным?
sentences.text_translation_en: What sport do you usually do on weekends?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我最近开始打羽毛球了，感觉特别有意思。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn kāishǐ dǎ yǔmáoqiú le, gǎnjué tèbié yǒuyìsi.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda badminton o'ynay boshladim, juda qiziqarli ekan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Недавно начал играть в бадминтон — кажется, это очень интересно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I recently started playing badminton — it feels really fun.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 以前很少打。上个月朋友带我打了一次，我就喜欢上了。
sentences.pinyin: Yǐqián hěn shǎo dǎ. Shàng ge yuè péngyou dài wǒ dǎ le yí cì, wǒ jiù xǐhuān shàng le.
sentences.text_translation: Avval kam o'ynardim. O'tgan oy do'stim meni bir marta o'ynashga olib bordi, shundan keyin yoqtirib qoldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Раньше играл редко. В прошлом месяце друг сводил меня поиграть, и мне сразу понравилось.
sentences.text_translation_en: I rarely played before. Last month a friend took me to play once, and I fell in love with it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我们公司附近有一个体育馆，周末人不多，场地很好租。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī fùjìn yǒu yí ge tǐyùguǎn, zhōumò rén bù duō, chǎngdì hěn hǎo zū.
sentences.text_translation: Ofisimiz yaqinida sport zali bor, dam olish kunlari odam kam bo'ladi, maydonni ijaraga olish oson.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рядом с нашей компанией есть спортзал, по выходным там немного людей, и площадку легко арендовать.
sentences.text_translation_en: There's a sports hall near our office; it's not crowded on weekends and the court is easy to book.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不会，但是我一直想学。你觉得网球难吗？
sentences.pinyin: Bú huì, dànshì wǒ yìzhí xiǎng xué. Nǐ juéde wǎngqiú nán ma?
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q, lekin doim o'rganmoqchi bo'lganman. Seningcha tennis qiyinmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет, но я всё время хотел научиться. Как думаешь, теннис сложный?
sentences.text_translation_en: No, but I've always wanted to learn. Do you think tennis is hard?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有点难，但是学会以后特别有成就感。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu diǎn nán, dànshì xuéhuì yǐhòu tèbié yǒu chéngjiùgǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Birozroq qiyin, lekin o'rganib olgandan keyin katta qoniqish hissi beradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного сложный, но после того как научишься, появляется особое чувство достижения.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit hard, but once you learn it, it's really satisfying.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那我也找机会试试。你周末有时间教我吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ yě zhǎo jīhuì shì shi. Nǐ zhōumò yǒu shíjiān jiāo wǒ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda men ham imkoniyat topib ko'rib ko'raman. Dam olish kunlari menga o'rgatishga vaqting bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда и я при случае попробую. У тебя есть время на выходных меня поучить?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll find a chance to give it a try too. Do you have time to teach me this weekend?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 可以啊！周末上午我一般都有空。
sentences.pinyin: Kěyǐ a! Zhōumò shàngwǔ wǒ yìbān dōu yǒu kòng.
sentences.text_translation: Albatta! Dam olish kunlari ertalab odatda bo'sh bo'laman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Конечно! По выходным утром я обычно свободен.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure! I'm usually free on weekend mornings.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 太好了！我们约这周六上午怎么样？
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen yuē zhè zhōuliù shàngwǔ zěnmeyàng?
sentences.text_translation: Juda zo'r! Shu shanba ertalabga kelishaylikmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Давай договоримся на эту субботу утром?
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! How about we set it for this Saturday morning?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 没问题。你需要自己带球拍，我这边有多余的。
sentences.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Nǐ xūyào zìjǐ dài qiúpāi, wǒ zhè biān yǒu duōyú de.
sentences.text_translation: Muammo yo'q. O'zing raketka olib kelishing kerak, menda zaxirasi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Без проблем. Тебе нужна своя ракетка, у меня есть запасная.
sentences.text_translation_en: No problem. You'll need to bring your own racket — I have a spare one here.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，那我先去买一个。周六上午体育馆见！
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒ xiān qù mǎi yí ge. Zhōuliù shàngwǔ tǐyùguǎn jiàn!
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, unda avval borib bitta sotib olaman. Shanba ertalab sport zalida ko'rishamiz!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, тогда я сначала куплю одну. Встретимся в субботу утром в спортзале!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, then I'll go buy one first. See you Saturday morning at the sports hall!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Xotirjam bo'l, albatta o'z vaqtida yetib boraman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не волнуйся, я точно приду вовремя!
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry, I'll definitely be there on time!
sentences.speaker: B
